input_contract: Drive root, model checkpoints, dataset zips
completion_gate: audit_complete=true; protocol_ready is reported separately and remains false while any blocker is deferred

input_contract: Chapman ZIP, runtime with Mamba wheels, A100 High-RAM, versioned model dir on Drive
output_contract: fold*_best_ema.pt, fold*_best_raw.pt, fold*_final_ema.pt, fold*_final_raw.pt, folds.pkl, fold_split_audit.json, fold_label_prevalence.csv, training_log_epochs.csv, cv_results_clean_core.csv, retrain_best_ema_checkpoint_manifest.json
metrics: fixed-epoch and diagnostic training metrics with shared Q=3 aggregation and explicit checkpoint metadata
completion_gate: all five fold*_final_ema.pt exist at the pre-specified epoch with weights_kind=ema and selection_rule=fixed_final_epoch; best_ema checkpoints are retained as diagnostics

input_contract: Chapman, explicit fold*_final_ema.pt checkpoints from post-fix retrain, verified Drive mirror; external datasets only after fold PCA build
output_contract: canonical frozen final_ema OOF NPZ and oof_final_ema_freeze_manifest.json; best_ema and external files remain diagnostic/experimental
metrics: record-level y_true/y_prob plus Q=3 equivalence, five-fold coverage, SHA256 checkpoint/artifact provenance
completion_gate: OOF final_ema freeze manifest reports manuscript_ready=true, checkpoint_kind=final_ema, and complete fixed-epoch provenance; external outputs are not part of this completion gate

input_contract: prediction NPZ with y_true and y_prob
metrics: ECE, Brier, ROC-AUC CI, PR-AUC CI
